findings: Running count = len(claimed/*.json), completed = len(results/*.json), queued = len(queue/*.json); no separate top-level failed count. stampede-monitor.sh:69-77
Count sources: state.json for total_tasks snapshot, fleet.json for roles, swarm-state.json per commander for nested telemetry. stampede-monitor.sh:20,41-55,87-89
Fallback TOTAL_TASKS uses find on full paths across queue/claimed/results dirs — same task in multiple dirs is double-counted (off-by-one risk). stampede-monitor.sh:75
Race window: queue/claimed/results counted in separate find calls; concurrent mv during task claiming can momentarily skew counts. stampede-monitor.sh:86-89
Empty-run guard: if computed total==0, forces TOTAL_TASKS=1 (synthetic denominator). stampede-monitor.sh:74-77
Metaswarm nested counts displayed per-commander via swarm-state.json telemetry: workers_running, workers_completed, workers_failed, atoms_received. stampede-monitor.sh:145-190
No aggregate commander-vs-worker summary row; nested display is per-commander inline only.
